#zcash #aisecurity #zeroknowledgeproof #blockchainsecurity #cbdc #cryptocurrency

https://radarkilat.com/en/article/ai-model-finds-4-year-vulnerability-in-zcash-protocol-experts-warn-of-similar-risks-in-global-financial-system

These persons are apt to think of the products of #computing as somehow "objective" prima facie because the machines themselves owe their existence to a profound degree of understanding of the physical sciences, and they have an idealized understanding of #software as always being "logical" and deterministic—a fallacy which supports such disastrous manifestations of tech culture as #cryptocurrency in which the purported determinism and infallibility of software is asserted to rival or even exceed the gold standard as a basis for exchange of value.

Needless to say, anyone who knows anything about the reliability of corporate software knows how ludicrous this assertion is...but people still gamble on it—out of desperation if nothing else.

(cont'd)

Zcash Bug Crisis Shows Privacy Cuts Both Ways, Experts Say

Shielding funds from prying eyes has long been Zcash’s forte, but investors’ unease on Friday indicated that the privacy coin’s core feature can also resemble an Achilles' heel.

Following the disclosure of a bug that had the potential to unleash a wave of counterfeit coins, #Zcash tanked to a 1-month low. The #PrivacyCoin recently changed hands around $350, a 33% decrease over the past day.

Impersonation, Click Hijacking, and TDS: Inside a Malware Distribution Ecosystem

A large-scale operation impersonates open-source and freeware projects to capture search traffic, targeting tools such as Ghidra, dnSpy, and SpiderFoot. The professionally designed sites load CloudFront-hosted JavaScript that converts download button clicks into handoffs to a Traffic Distribution System (TDS), which enforces strict gating including first-visit state, click confirmation, anti-bot logic, VPN filtering, and frequency capping. The ecosystem appears primarily built for traffic acquisition and monetization using legitimate ad-tech, but downstream redirect chains repeatedly led selected users to malware delivery infrastructure. The observed payloads include SessionGate (a multi-stage loader with heavy obfuscation delivering potentially unwanted applications), RemusStealer (an infostealer targeting over 20 browsers and hundreds of extensions), and AnimateClipper (a cryptocurrency clipper supporting 20+ blockchain ecosystems). Over 5,000 VirusTotal submissions indicate substantial reach across the ...

US Sanctions Nobitex Crypto Exchange Over Terrorism Financing Links

The US Treasury has sanctioned Nobitex, Iran's largest crypto exchange, and several top executives, citing its role in supporting the regime and processing over 50% of Iranian digital asset inflows. This move is part of a broader effort to crack down on terrorism financing through cryptocurrency.

https://osintsights.com/us-sanctions-nobitex-crypto-exchange-over-terrorism-financing-links?utm_source=mastodon&utm_medium=social
